title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
